title: 渣打銀行 summer intern(quality assurance ) interview 會問d咩

replies.msg:
JD 如下：
Assist in execution of User Acceptance Testing

Support test leader to monitor and report overall project progress

Monitor and Report any defects arise from testing programmes.


黎緊會in 1 to 1 face interview , 上黎問下 取取經，請問interview 會問d 咩， 會唔會問technical 野
